_doc: Curated known-denied test vectors per underlying, read by test/UnderlyingDenyList.t.sol. These are real mainnet-blacklisted addresses; the suite reads each token's deny-list getter for these addresses on the live fork and asserts they are reported denied. A handful per token is enough (the suite checks at most 5). Fields: token = underlying address; blacklisted = denied addresses. To add a token, add an entry.
